title: Classify validation failures for missing screenshots versus missing review metadata
description: Extend Sentinel's Atlas-era validation output so it can distinguish missing visual proof from missing Brandie-backed review context, reducing false assumptions during migration and review-pack adoption.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel validation can classify missing screenshot artifacts separately from missing Brandie review metadata
Output remains understandable for products that do not use Brandie-backed metadata at all
Failures make it obvious whether the next action belongs in Atlas capture, Brandie exports, or integration wiring
Tests cover at least one screenshot-missing case, one metadata-missing case, and one mixed case
proofRequirements: validation tests or example output prove the new classification behavior
migration docs mention the distinction directly
nonGoals: making review metadata a required gate for all Sentinel validation
replacing Atlas dashboard review with CLI output
